contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce ID of the contact to send the onboarding message to.

assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce ID of the installed asset.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The name of the customer receiving the onboarding message.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the installed device.

vehicleName.title: vehicleName
vehicleName.description: The name of the vehicle the device was installed on.

allMetrics.title: allMetrics
allMetrics.description: A consolidated summary of all telemetry metrics to include in the message.

telemetryStatus.title: telemetryStatus
telemetryStatus.description: The overall telemetry status to include in the message.
